note: Owner-authored identity overrides for the R15-R19 catch-up (owner ruling 2026-07-20). These resolve export display names that do NOT cleanly map to a single active stable identity, BY STABLE KEY and never by display name or row order. Values are store `key`s. Applied BEFORE the name resolver; a covered name with no matching rule is treated as UNRESOLVED (halt), never guessed.

overrides.name: Callum Brown
overrides.reason: Owner ruling 2026-07-20: the export lists 'Callum Brown'; the active player is 'Callum M. Brown' (key callum-brown-ire, St Kilda) — FootyWire omits the middle initial. The only exact 'Callum Brown' in the store is retired. All listed 'Callum Brown' scores attach to callum-brown-ire.

overrides.name: Bailey Williams
overrides.reason: Owner ruling 2026-07-20: two active players share the display name 'Bailey Williams'. Bailey Williams (key bailey-williams-wb, Collingwood): R18=55, R19=137. Bailey J. Williams (key bailey-williams-wc, Sydney): R16=67, R17=82, R18=100, R19=84. Disambiguated by (round, score) so each listed score reaches the correct stable record; the two never collapse.
